expectations.text: Recommends a polyglot-capable orchestrator (Bazel, Pants, or Moon) — not Turborepo
expectations.evidence: Recommends 'turbo or nx, plus make/task' as root task runner. Turborepo is JS-only and not a polyglot orchestrator. Makefile is used as a workaround but lacks dependency graph, caching, and affected detection across languages.

expectations.text: Provides a directory structure showing all three languages coexisting
expectations.evidence: Full tree: services/ (Go), apps/web (React), ml/pipeline (Python), proto/, gen/

expectations.text: Addresses protobuf sharing with a shared definitions directory and per-language codegen
expectations.evidence: Excellent proto/ setup with buf.yaml, buf.gen.yaml generating Go, TypeScript, and Python stubs into gen/
Mentions 'Keep protobuf ownership clear: one team/review path for proto/' but does not provide a CODEOWNERS file or explicit ownership model

expectations.text: Includes at least one config example for the chosen orchestrator
expectations.evidence: Provides turbo.json (JS-only orchestrator config) and a Makefile. Neither constitutes a polyglot orchestrator config. Turbo cannot orchestrate Go or Python builds natively.
